---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement to the Kairos terminal
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or behavior you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Mockups, links, or examples from other tools.

---
> **AI/Governance feature?** File it in [specsmith](https://github.com/BitConcepts/specsmith/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) instead.
